description: A hospital network needs to reconcile patient records from a newly acquired clinic. Using the 'MASTER_PATIENT_INDEX' and 'CLINIC_INTAKE' tables in the HR schema, identify corresponding patients using probabilistic matching. Create a table named 'PATIENT_LINKAGE' with columns INTAKE_ID (NUMBER), MPI_ID (NUMBER), and MATCH_SCORE (NUMBER). Populate this table with matches where Date of Birth (DOB) and Gender match exactly, and the average Jaro-Winkler similarity of the First Name and Last Name is 90 or greater. Use the Oracle 'UTL_MATCH' package for similarity calculations. Export the contents of 'PATIENT_LINKAGE' to /home/ga/Desktop/linkage_report.csv, ordered by match score descending. Connection details: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
